category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Ecuador RTE INEN certificate of conformity, energy labelling (INEN/MEER), and IEC-based safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Ecuador Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入厄瓜多爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Ecuador's mandatory RTE INEN technical regulations, certificate of conformity (INEN-1), energy-efficiency labelling (INEN/MEER), IEC 60335-2-24 safety, R-600a refrigerant rules, and 120/220 V 60 Hz grid requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与厄瓜多尔强制性RTE INEN技术法规、合格证书（INEN-1）、能效标识（INEN/MEER）、IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a制冷剂规则及120/220V 60Hz电网要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與厄瓜多爾強制性RTE INEN技術法規、合格證書（INEN-1）、能效標識（INEN/MEER）、IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a製冷劑規則及120/220V 60Hz電網要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ecuadorian RTE INEN regulations, NTE INEN standards, energy-label thresholds, and certificate-of-conformity procedures with qualified professionals and the Ecuadorian importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及厄瓜多尔进口商核验现行厄瓜多尔RTE INEN法规、NTE INEN标准、能效标签门槛值及合格证书办理程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及厄瓜多爾進口商核驗現行厄瓜多爾RTE INEN法規、NTE INEN標準、能效標籤門檻值及合格證書辦理程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five main Ecuador compliance gaps: (1) a mandatory Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1 / recognized accredited body) against the applicable RTE INEN technical regulation must be obtained before customs clearance at Guayaquil — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated to NTE INEN / IEC 60335-2-24, and the appliance must be rated for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz grid, which differs from China's 220/380 V 50 Hz; (3) energy-efficiency labelling under the INEN/MEER (Ministry of Energy) scheme using NTE INEN test methods is mandatory; (4) the R-600a refrigerant charge and flammability documentation must align with IEC 60335-2-24 Annex requirements; and (5) an in-country Ecuadorian importer/registrant is required as there is no foreign self-declaration route. Ecuador has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime for refrigerators.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大厄瓜多尔合规差距：（1）须在产品于瓜亚基尔通关前，依据适用的RTE INEN技术法规取得强制性合格证书（INEN-1/认可的认证机构）——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）电气安全须依据NTE INEN/IEC 60335-2-24证明，且器具须按厄瓜多尔120/220V 60Hz电网额定，该电网与中国220/380V 50Hz不同；（3）依据INEN/MEER（能源部）方案并采用NTE INEN试验方法的能效标识为强制性；（4）R-600a制冷剂充注量及可燃性文件须符合IEC 60335-2-24附件要求；（5）须有厄瓜多尔境内进口商/注册人，因为不存在外国自我声明途径。厄瓜多尔对电冰箱无欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或室外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大厄瓜多爾合規差距：（1）須在產品於瓜亞基爾通關前，依據適用的RTE INEN技術法規取得強制性合格證書（INEN-1/認可的認證機構）——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）電氣安全須依據NTE INEN/IEC 60335-2-24證明，且器具須按厄瓜多爾120/220V 60Hz電網額定，該電網與中國220/380V 50Hz不同；（3）依據INEN/MEER（能源部）方案並採用NTE INEN試驗方法的能效標識為強制性；（4）R-600a製冷劑充注量及可燃性文件須符合IEC 60335-2-24附件要求；（5）須有厄瓜多爾境內進口商/註冊人，因為不存在外國自我聲明途徑。厄瓜多爾對電冰箱無歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或室外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (INEN, MEER/Ministerio de Energia, SAE accreditation, Servicio Nacional de Aduana del Ecuador SENAE) or primary legal sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted as canonical.
